comment_text: Just putting this out there, People said "no" to Popeye. The man loves Popeye. I love Popeye. comment_text:
It's nearly Christmas, and Mom is taking you to the store to see Santa. You're visibly shaking from excitement because you have the perfect list of toys to ask for. 
You arrive and there his is, sitting in his big red chair, chuckling and laughing in his jolly ol' way.
Finally, it's your turn! The sweet, young elf woman escorts you to the big man himself, Mrs. Claus helping you up the stairs to her husband. You sit on his lap and tell him everything you want for Christmas and, guess what? He tells you that if you're a good boy or girl, he might just make that wish happen! 
The rest of the mall trip is dull by comparison, and you're talking and rambling animatedly as you're leaving the mall. But then you hear a noise. You turn and there's Santa, big red coat open and pants around his ankles. Smoke from a glass pipe wafts up towards the sky as the sweet little elf girl is on her knees in front of what used to be your idol.

That's what it's like finding out Genndy is actually behind this absolute pile of garbage.

comment_text: I don’t want to immediately trash Genndy Tartakovsky for this, yes it’s uncomfortable, but I think that’s the point; I think the movie is trying to satirize or point fun at the discomfort you feel seeing an animal fornicate. Yes it’s uncomfortable. I believe the viewer is supposed to feel uncomfortable seeing this. I’m not a huge fan of this type of humor (coming from a Hazbin Hotel disliker), but I have a hunch that someone like Mr Tartakovsky, who made mature works like Primal and Unicorn Warriors, could handle another one like this pretty well. I could be wrong, but whatever, artists don’t have to come out on top every time. If it’s bad it’s bad, and that’ll be disappointing, but I won’t be mad at him for this. Perhaps he’s trying something new. Just becuase he makes one bad thing doesn’t mean he’s ruined. But anyways the trailer could also be doing it dirty like Q Force
